task: Move the pan to the top right corner of the stove
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A silver pan is on a stovetop. The pan has a handle and a body. The stovetop has a flat surface with a top right corner. STRATEGY - Reach the pan, grasp its handle for control, transport it to the top right corner, and place it there. Failure modes include dropping the pan or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the pan body; Step 2 grasp the handle for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the top right corner; Step 4 place on the corner surface.**
Goal: on(pan, stove_top_top_right); stable(pan)
Scene: pan, stove_top, stove_top_top_right
Step 1: reach(pan)
  affordance_region: the body of the pan
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pan, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pan) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pan)
  affordance_region: the handle of the pan
  contact: holding(pan) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pan)
Step 3: transport(pan -> stove_top_top_right)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the top right corner of the stove_top
  spatial: above(pan, stove_top_top_right, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pan)
  done_when: above(pan, stove_top_top_right, 0.05)
Step 4: place(pan -> stove_top_top_right)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the top right corner of the stove_top
  contact: surface_contact(pan, stove_top_top_right) [completion]; released(pan) [completion]
  pose: stable(pan) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pan, stove_top_top_right) AND released(pan)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area on the top right corner of the stove_top
an empty area on the top right corner of the stove_top
